Title: Pricing URL Source: https://tinfoil.sh/pricing Markdown Content: # Tinfoil - Pricing [![Image 1: Tinfoil Logo](https://tinfoil.sh/brand-assets/logo-white.svg)](https://tinfoil.sh/ "Home") About [Company](https://tinfoil.sh/company)[Mission](https://tinfoil.sh/mission)[Join Us](https://tinfoil.sh/join) [Technology](https://tinfoil.sh/technology) [Docs](https://docs.tinfoil.sh/) [Blog](https://tinfoil.sh/blog) [Pricing](https://tinfoil.sh/pricing) Products [Private Chat](https://chat.tinfoil.sh/)[Private Inference](https://tinfoil.sh/inference)[Tinfoil Containers](https://tinfoil.sh/containers) Get Started # Tinfoil Products Chat API Access Containers Enterprise ![Image 2](https://tinfoil.sh/chat-pricing-bg.jpeg) ![Image 3](https://tinfoil.sh/chat-pricing-bg.jpeg) ### Private Chat A powerful AI assistant that keeps all your data private. $20/month [Try the Chat](https://chat.tinfoil.sh/) Includes: * Generous rate limits* * Access to projects * Ability to search the web * Chat across web and iOS * Sync across devices * Speech to text * Document upload * Powerful multi-modal AI *Fair use policy applies. Usage may be throttled during peak demand. ## Request GPU Access Tell us a bit about your use case and we'll get back to you as soon as possible. Email What are you looking to run?Optional Send ## Frequently Asked Questions ### What models are available? ### How is billing calculated? ### Cancel any time? ### What payment methods do you accept? ### Company * [Technology](https://tinfoil.sh/technology) * [Docs](https://docs.tinfoil.sh/) * [Blog](https://tinfoil.sh/blog) * [About](https://tinfoil.sh/company) * [Mission](https://tinfoil.sh/mission) * [Brand Assets](https://tinfoil.sh/brand) ### Products * [Chat](https://chat.tinfoil.sh/) * [Inference](https://tinfoil.sh/inference) * [Containers](https://tinfoil.sh/containers) * [Models](https://tinfoil.sh/models) * [Pricing](https://tinfoil.sh/pricing) ### Legal * [Terms of Service](https://tinfoil.sh/terms) * [Privacy Policy](https://tinfoil.sh/privacy) * [Cookie Policy](https://tinfoil.sh/cookie) ### Connect * [Contact](https://tinfoil.sh/contact) * [Email us](mailto:contact@tinfoil.sh) * [Join Us](https://tinfoil.sh/join) [](https://x.com/TinfoilAI)[](https://www.linkedin.com/company/94894201/)[](https://github.com/tinfoilsh) © 2026 Tinfoil Inc.
